nodes.label: run-experiment skill
nodes.rationale: How to plan/write/run a draft-6 phase experiment: methodology, seeds, the 6-slot exp card, write-boundary.

nodes.label: Draft-6 experiment methodology
nodes.rationale: One variable per experiment; seeds [42,137,271,314,1729] report median+IQR; failures are data (don't tune to pass); defer fallbacks until baseline characterized; defer PVT realism until the ideal converges; the 6-slot exp card (question->setup->run->result->read->decision).
